attacker_controlled_source: Network path to remote signer endpoint when TLS disabled
sensitive_sink: Signature requests and key retrieval over gRPC channel
missing_guard: No enforcement that production endpoints require TLS/mTLS
exploit_prerequisites: Operator config sets enable_tls=false on untrusted network
impact_if_true: MITM could tamper signer responses or observe signing traffic
missing_evidence_needed: Need deployment defaults and whether remote signer endpoint can be non-local in bounty scope.
